description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a skeletonized stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The main body is robust and angular, with a detachable box magazine positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. A vertical foregrip is mounted beneath the handguard, enhancing stability during firing. The rifle is equipped with a scope mounted on the top rail, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be free of any specialized muzzle device. The overall finish is matte black, giving it a utilitarian and stealthy appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, matte black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, scope, vertical foregrip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized stock, scope, vertical foregrip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, vertical foregrip, and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the stock and magazine.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the scope, with the barrel extending forward.
